keyPoints: Durability of long-run skill and taste after AI withdrawal—central test for depth-enabled designs
Depth-enabled design patterns (reflective prompts, constraint-based workflows, diverse output sampling) as mechanisms for durable competencies
Differentiate in-AI durability signals from true post-disengagement durability; emphasize longitudinal post-AI measurement gaps
Plan longitudinal, cross-domain studies with defined post-disengagement assessment windows and objective performance/taste metrics
Provide actionable design heuristics and user protocols: staged disengagement, retrieval practice, provenance logging, reflective prompts
Mitigate failure modes (over-reliance, homogenization, mode collapse) with friction, diverse sampling, governance, and ethics training
Frame cultural guidance for a post-AI world that prizes strong character, responsible decision-making, long-term ambitious projects, and disciplined taste
